parallelizable_groups.note: GitHub service + Pydantic schemas in parallel
Stats + sync status endpoints in parallel
Web components can be built in parallel

tasks.title: Project scaffold: pyproject.toml, src layout, CLI entry point
tasks.description: Initialize git repo. Create pyproject.toml with src layout, all Python dependencies, and [project.scripts] starz = 'starz.cli:app'. Create src/starz/__init__.py, src/starz/cli.py with typer app stub (--help works), .gitignore, .env.example, LICENSE (MIT), Makefile with dev/install targets.
acceptance_criteria: pip install -e . succeeds
starz --help shows available commands
src layout with src/starz/ package
pyproject.toml has all dependencies listed
MIT LICENSE file present
tasks.verification: pip install -e . && starz --help

tasks.title: Config module: env loading, XDG data paths
tasks.description: Create src/starz/config.py. Load GITHUB_TOKEN (fallback to subprocess gh auth token), OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env or .env file. Define data_dir as ~/.starz/ (XDG_DATA_HOME fallback). Define db_path as data_dir/starz.db. Auto-create data_dir on import.
acceptance_criteria: Config loads env vars from .env and environment
gh auth token fallback works when GITHUB_TOKEN not set
~/.starz/ directory created automatically
db_path resolves to ~/.starz/starz.db
tasks.verification: python -c 'from starz.config import settings; print(settings.db_path)'

tasks.title: Database layer: SQLite + sqlite-vec client and schema
tasks.description: Create src/starz/db/schema.sql with repos table and repo_embeddings vec0 virtual table (exact DDL from PRD). Create src/starz/db/client.py with get_db() context manager that loads sqlite-vec extension, runs schema.sql on first use, and provides cursor. Include upsert_repo() and get_repos() helper functions.
acceptance_criteria: sqlite-vec extension loads successfully
Schema creates repos table with all columns from PRD
Schema creates repo_embeddings vec0 virtual table with FLOAT[1536]
Indexes on category and language created
Upsert works: insert new, update existing on full_name conflict
get_db() auto-creates schema on first call
tasks.verification: python -c 'from starz.db.client import get_db; db = get_db(); print(db.execute("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master").fetchall())'

tasks.title: GitHub service: fetch stars + READMEs
tasks.description: Create src/starz/services/github.py. Implement fetch_starred_repos() using httpx.AsyncClient with GitHub token. Paginate GET /user/starred?per_page=100 with Accept: application/vnd.github.star+json header. Implement fetch_readmes() with asyncio.Semaphore(10) for concurrency, 5s timeout per request, base64 decode, truncate to 4000 chars. Combine into sync_from_github() that fetches repos, fetches READMEs, and upserts all into DB.
acceptance_criteria: All starred repos fetched across all pages
starred_at captured per repo
READMEs fetched in parallel (max 10 concurrent)
5s timeout per README — missing READMEs handled gracefully
READMEs truncated to 4000 chars
All repos upserted into DB with synced_at timestamp
Works with both GITHUB_TOKEN env and gh auth token fallback
tasks.verification: starz sync (after T-08 wires it) — check DB has repos with readme_content

tasks.title: Pydantic schemas: repo and chat models
tasks.description: Create src/starz/schemas/repo.py with RepoOut (API response), RepoList (paginated), RepoFilters (query params). Create src/starz/schemas/chat.py with ChatRequest (query + history), ChatResponse (answer + sources). All models use Pydantic v2.
acceptance_criteria: RepoOut includes all display fields (full_name, description, language, category, summary, html_url, etc.)
RepoFilters accepts category, language, q as optional query params
ChatRequest has query (str) and history (optional list of messages)
ChatResponse has answer (str) and sources (list of repo references)
tasks.verification: python -c 'from starz.schemas.repo import RepoOut; print(RepoOut.model_json_schema())'

tasks.title: Embedding service: OpenAI vector generation + sqlite-vec storage
tasks.description: Create src/starz/services/embeddings.py. Implement embed_text(text) using OpenAI text-embedding-3-small. Implement embed_repos(repos) that builds combined text (name + desc + language + topics + README), calls OpenAI in batches, stores in repo_embeddings table, and updates embedding_text column. Implement query_similar(query_text, limit=10) that embeds the query and runs vec0 distance search.
acceptance_criteria: Embedding generated from combined repo text
1536-dim vectors stored in repo_embeddings
embedding_text field updated in repos table
Batch embedding to minimize API calls
query_similar returns top-N repos by vector distance
Skips repos that already have embeddings on re-run
tasks.verification: After sync with embeddings, run: python -c 'from starz.services.embeddings import query_similar; print(query_similar("react"))'

tasks.title: Categorizer service: Claude Haiku batch classification
tasks.description: Create src/starz/services/categorizer.py. Define CATEGORIES list (~15 categories from PRD). Implement categorize_repos(repos) that batches 20 repos per Claude Haiku call, sends name/description/language/topics, requests JSON response with category + summary per repo, updates DB. Idempotent: skips repos with existing category.
acceptance_criteria: 20 repos per batch API call
Each repo gets one of ~15 predefined categories
2-3 sentence summary generated per repo
Category + summary stored in repos table
Skips already-categorized repos
Handles Anthropic API errors gracefully (skip batch, continue)
tasks.verification: After sync with categorizer, check: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM repos GROUP BY category

tasks.title: Sync CLI command: wire fetch + embed + categorize pipeline
tasks.description: Wire starz sync CLI command in cli.py. Call github.sync_from_github(), then embeddings.embed_repos(), then categorizer.categorize_repos(). Use rich.progress for terminal progress bars. Print summary on completion (N repos synced, N new, N categorized).
acceptance_criteria: starz sync runs full pipeline: fetch → embed → categorize
Progress bars shown in terminal via rich
Summary printed on completion
Graceful error handling — partial progress preserved
Re-running sync is incremental (skips existing)
tasks.verification: starz sync — should populate DB with repos, embeddings, and categories

tasks.title: Search service + CLI command: vector + keyword search
tasks.description: Create src/starz/services/search.py. Implement vector_search(query, limit) using embeddings.query_similar(). Implement keyword_search(query, limit) that matches on language/topics/name. Implement search(query) that merges both, deduplicates, and returns ranked results. Add starz search 'query' CLI command that prints results as a rich table.
acceptance_criteria: Vector search returns semantically relevant repos
Keyword search boosts by language/topic match
Results merged and deduplicated
starz search 'react animation' prints relevant results in terminal
Each result shows: name, category, description, link
tasks.verification: starz search 'python web scraping' — verify relevant results appear

tasks.title: Chat service + CLI command: RAG pipeline
tasks.description: Create src/starz/services/chat.py. Implement chat(query, history) that: embeds query, retrieves top-10 repos via search service, builds context prompt with repo details, calls Claude Sonnet, returns response. Add starz chat CLI command that runs an interactive REPL (prompt → response loop) using rich for formatting.
acceptance_criteria: Chat retrieves relevant repos as context
Claude Sonnet generates natural language answer with repo links
Conversation history sent with each request
starz chat opens interactive REPL
Handles 'no match' gracefully
tasks.verification: starz chat → ask 'what testing libraries do I have?' → verify accurate response

tasks.title: FastAPI server: app factory + repo/stats endpoints
tasks.description: Create src/starz/server.py with FastAPI app factory. Create src/starz/endpoints/repos.py with GET /api/repos (filters: category, language, q), GET /api/repos/{id}. Create stats endpoint GET /api/stats returning counts by category/language. Add CORS middleware for localhost origins.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/repos returns paginated repo list
Supports ?category=, ?language=, ?q= filters
GET /api/repos/{id} returns single repo or 404
GET /api/stats returns category/language counts
CORS allows localhost:3000 and localhost:7827
tasks.verification: starz serve & curl http://localhost:7827/api/repos

tasks.title: API endpoints: sync + sync status
tasks.description: Create src/starz/endpoints/sync.py with POST /api/sync (triggers background sync pipeline) and GET /api/sync/status (returns current state: idle/fetching/embedding/categorizing/done + progress counts). Use a simple module-level state dict for sync status tracking.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/sync triggers sync pipeline in background task
GET /api/sync/status returns current state and progress
Multiple concurrent POST /api/sync calls are rejected (already syncing)
Status resets to idle after completion
tasks.verification: curl -X POST localhost:7827/api/sync && curl localhost:7827/api/sync/status

tasks.title: API endpoints: search + chat
tasks.description: Create src/starz/endpoints/search.py with POST /api/search (body: {query, limit}). Create src/starz/endpoints/chat.py with POST /api/chat (body: {query, history}). Both delegate to their respective services. Wire starz serve command in cli.py to start uvicorn on port 7827.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/search returns ranked repo results with scores
POST /api/chat returns natural language answer with sources
starz serve starts uvicorn on port 7827
All 7 API endpoints accessible
tasks.verification: curl -X POST localhost:7827/api/search -d '{"query": "react animation"}'

tasks.title: Web scaffold: Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui with static export
tasks.description: Initialize web/ with create-next-app. Configure next.config.ts for output: 'export'. Install Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui. Create src/lib/api.ts fetch wrapper pointing at localhost:7827/api. Create layout.tsx with Inter font, dark mode support. Create empty page.tsx shell.
acceptance_criteria: next build produces static export in web/out/
shadcn/ui components installable via CLI
API wrapper configured for backend URL
Layout has proper metadata and font setup
Dark mode via class strategy
tasks.verification: cd web && bun run build — check out/ directory exists

tasks.title: Web: repo browse page — grid, cards, filters, search bar
tasks.description: Build the main browse experience. Create repo-card.tsx (name, description, language badge, category badge, star count, link). Create repo-grid.tsx (responsive grid, loading skeleton). Create search-bar.tsx (text input, triggers /api/repos?q=). Create category-filter.tsx (sidebar with category counts from /api/stats). Wire page.tsx to compose all components with state management.
acceptance_criteria: Repo cards show: name, description, language, category, stars, link
Grid is responsive (1-3 columns)
Search bar filters via API text search
Category sidebar shows counts and filters on click
Language filter works
Loading skeletons while fetching
tasks.verification: Open localhost:3000 — browse repos, click categories, search by text

tasks.title: Web: chat panel component
tasks.description: Build chat-panel.tsx. Message list with user/assistant bubbles. Input with send button. Client-side history (useState array). POST to /api/chat with query + history. Parse response, render repo links as clickable. Auto-scroll to bottom on new message. Integrate into page.tsx as a slide-out or side panel.
acceptance_criteria: Message input with send button
User and assistant messages displayed as conversation
History maintained in client state during session
Repo names in responses rendered as clickable links
Loading indicator while waiting for response
Auto-scroll to latest message
tasks.verification: Open chat, ask 'what React libraries do I have?' — verify answer with links

tasks.title: Web: sync button + static bundle into Python package
tasks.description: Build sync-button.tsx that triggers POST /api/sync, polls GET /api/sync/status for progress, shows progress bar, refreshes repo grid on completion. Add Makefile target: make build-web that runs next build in web/ and copies out/ to src/starz/static/. Update server.py to mount StaticFiles from static/ directory. Update pyproject.toml to include static/ in package data.
acceptance_criteria: Sync button triggers sync and shows progress
Grid refreshes after sync completes
make build-web produces src/starz/static/ with bundled frontend
starz serve serves both API and static UI on port 7827
Static files included in Python package
tasks.verification: make build-web && starz serve — open localhost:7827 in browser

tasks.title: OSS polish: README, .env.example, error handling
tasks.description: Write README.md with: badges, install command, quickstart (3 steps), screenshots placeholder, CLI reference, API reference, contributing section. Update .env.example with all 3 vars documented. Add consistent error handling across all services (try/except with logging, skip-and-continue pattern). Add empty state UI when no repos synced yet.
acceptance_criteria: README has install + quickstart instructions
README has CLI and API reference
.env.example documents all required vars
GitHub API failure doesn't crash sync
OpenAI failure skips repo, continues
Anthropic failure skips batch, continues
Web UI shows helpful empty state before first sync
tasks.verification: Read README, follow quickstart from scratch

tasks.title: PyPI packaging: metadata, classifiers, entry points
tasks.description: Finalize pyproject.toml for PyPI publishing. Add: project name, version, description, author, license, classifiers, requires-python >= 3.11, readme = README.md, [project.urls] for GitHub. Ensure [project.scripts] starz = 'starz.cli:app'. Add [tool.hatch.build] or [tool.setuptools.package-data] to include static/ directory. Test: pip install . from clean venv.
acceptance_criteria: pip install . works in clean venv
starz command available after install
Static files included in installed package
Package metadata correct for PyPI
tasks.verification: python -m venv /tmp/test-starz && source /tmp/test-starz/bin/activate && pip install . && starz --help

tasks.title: Incremental sync: diff-based re-sync
tasks.description: Update github.sync_from_github() to diff fetched repos against existing DB records on full_name. Only fetch READMEs for new repos. Update embeddings.embed_repos() to skip repos with existing embeddings. Categorizer already skips categorized repos (idempotent). Print 'N new, N updated, N skipped' summary.
acceptance_criteria: Second starz sync only processes new/changed repos
README fetch skipped for existing repos
Embedding generation skipped for repos with embeddings
Summary shows new/updated/skipped counts
tasks.verification: Run starz sync twice — second run should be much faster

tasks.title: CLAUDE.md: project conventions and operational rules
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md with: project description, tech stack summary, directory structure, dev commands (make dev, starz sync, starz serve), testing instructions, contribution guidelines reference, key architectural decisions.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md accurately describes the project
Dev workflow documented
Key commands listed
tasks.verification: Read CLAUDE.md — should be sufficient for a new contributor to get started
